heading: Time period for disposal of dogs or cats by dealers or exhibitors
label: 2135 Time period for disposal of dogs or cats by dealers or exhibitors
text: No dealer or exhibitor shall sell or otherwise dispose of any dog or cat within a period of five business days after the acquisition of such animal or within such other period as may be specified by the Secretary: , That operators of auction sales subject to shall not be required to comply with the provisions of this section.Providedsection 2142 of this title
notes: Amendments1970— inserted references to exhibitors and inserted proviso that operators of auction sales subject to shall not be required to comply with the provisions of this section.Pub. L. 91–579section 2142 of this title
